title: Sweet Yellow Pepper Fritters
description: Crunchy fritters filled with sweet and spicy yellow pepper and creamy goodness.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees.
In a bowl mix together yellow, eggs, and pepper.
Add sweet yellow pepper and creamy mixture to the bowl and mix.
Heat yellow mixture in a pan over medium heat until warm.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the mixture into the hot oil.
Fry for 3-4 minutes or until golden brown.
Drain on paper towels and serve.
